name: HWR_EXPERIENCE_VL
query: SELECT B.EXPERIENCE_ID , B.SOURCE_ID , B.COMPANY , B.DESCRIPTION , B.END_DATE , B.START_DATE , B.TITLE , B.EXPERIENCE_TYPE , X.PRFL_ID , B.CREATED_BY , B.CREATION_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATED_BY , B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_EXPERIENCE_B B LEFT JOIN HWR_EXPERIENCE_PRFL_X X ON (B.EXPERIENCE_ID = X.EXPERIENCE_ID AND B.SOURCE_ID = X.SOURCE_ID)
